heading: Modify Custom Roles
body:
**Atlascli:**Atlas CLITo update a custom database role for your project using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:```sh

atlas customDbRoles update <roleName> [options]

```To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas customDbRoles update](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-customDbRoles-update).**Api:**Atlas Administration APITo modify custom roles through the Atlas Administration API,
see [Update One](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-updategroupcustomdbrolerole).**Ui:**Atlas UIFollow these steps to modify a custom role through the
Atlas UI:
